fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the Object Values.

fields.name: code
fields.description: The code representing the Object Values.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A description of the Object Values.

fields.name: dateFrom
fields.description: The date from which the object value is valid.

fields.name: dateTo
fields.description: The date to which the object value is valid.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the Object Value was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the Object Value was last modified.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The owner identifier of the object value.

fields.name: dbSubId
fields.description: The db sub id of the object value.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The id of the object value.

fields.name: objectKindDbId
fields.description: The object kind db id of the object value.

fields.name: posting
fields.description: The posting status of the object value.
